examples: Eddie wore blue jeans and a plaid shirt.
Eddie parked his bicycle against a lamppost and padlocked it.
Eddie was a short squat fellow in his forties with thinning hair.
Eddie Rickenbacker, the World War I ace, bravely founded Eastern Airlines in the late 1930s.
Broadcaster Eddie Mair has dismissed suggestions that he could replace Jeremy Paxman on BBC Two's Newsnight.
